allow: Bash(node -e "const s = require\(''./swagger.json''\); console.log\(''Valid JSON. Paths:'', Object.keys\(s.paths\).filter\(p => p.includes\(''rider''\) || p.includes\(''inhouse''\) || p.includes\(''coupons''\)\).join\('', ''\)\); console.log\(''Schemas:'', Object.keys\(s.components.schemas\).filter\(k => k.includes\(''Rider''\) || k.includes\(''Coupon''\) || k.includes\(''AdminPlace''\)\).join\('', ''\)\);")
